input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A blue graphic in the top left corner reveals white text reading "FACTS." and "youtube.com/facts". The male subject, wearing a black leather jacket over a red hoodie, lowers his right hand from his chin. Both individuals open their mouths slightly. The female subject wears a grey sweatshirt displaying "AUTHENTIC Wrangler" in white.</think><answer></answer>

[4-6] The view changes to five Pop-Tarts boxes under purple "IRISH PEOPLE TASTE TEST" text. Visible flavors include Limited Edition Red Velvet, Watermelon, Maple Bacon, S'mores, and Hot Fudge Sundae.
[6-10] Two males appear: one in a blue zip-up hoodie over a blue graphic tee, the other in a black Adidas jacket with "RORY'S STORIES" text. They gesture and smile; the blue-hoodie male gives a double thumbs-up.
[10-14] A brief shot shows a male with curly hair/glasses in a black tee beside a red-haired female in a floral top. Returning to the previous males, the blue-hoodie male gestures palm-up while the other looks on.

[14-16] A man in a blue hoodie examines his palm while a man in a black track jacket watches him intently. [16-18] A product shot displays a box labeled "LIMITED EDITION Pop-Tarts Red Velvet" next to a pastry on a plate with the text "RED VELVET". [18-22] A man in a leather jacket and red hoodie sits beside a woman in a grey "AUTHENTIC Wrangler" sweatshirt; they react to the pastry on the table before it is separated into two halves. [22-26] The first pair returns, both taking bites of the red pastries, then examining the food while the man in the black jacket points at his piece. [26-28] A person with curly hair in a black "EVERYTHING IS TERRIBLE" shirt and a person in a floral top hold red pastries.

recent_thinks: [28-30] The individual with curly hair and glasses bites the red pastry while the person in the floral top holds a piece. The scene cuts to the male in the leather jacket and female in the grey sweatshirt; she gestures with her raised left hand while two pastries rest on the plate.

[30-32] The scene shifts to two males at a table; the one in the blue hoodie peels white frosting from a red pastry rectangle while the male in the black track jacket eats a piece. A white plate with red crumbs rests on the table between them.

[32-34] The view cuts to a man in a black leather jacket holding a red pastry piece. Beside him, a woman in a grey sweatshirt with white text sits with eyes closed and hands clasped. A white plate with a pastry rests on the table in front of them.

[34-36] The male in the black leather jacket continues holding the red pastry with white frosting in his right hand, looking forward. The female in the grey 'AUTHENTIC Wrangler' sweatshirt remains seated with her eyes closed and hands clasped on the table. The white plate with the remaining pastry piece stays positioned between them.

Because the s'mores box was included in the initial row of boxes
